chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3001 of 2023 Syed Ali Shah Versus Saeed Badshah & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.14365/23 2. For orders on Misc. No.14366/23 3. For hearing of main case Dated: 06.03.2024 None present. -.-.- Ever since this petition was filed petitioner who has filed it in person has not appeared. He was called absent on 15.06.2023, 20.09.2023, 23.10.2023 and so also today. There is no intimation either. It appears that he has lost interest in the proceedings. Instant petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
